argv: Hero wide shot: a classic counter-top stand mixer with a glossy red enamel cast-metal body and polished stainless-steel bowl sits center frame on a butcher-block counter in a cream-and-oak kitchen. Subtle slow push-in toward the mixer. Soft flour dust on the wood, a wooden spoon resting beside the bowl. Quiet, no motion in the mixer itself. 50mm full-frame, medium-close framing, warm morning window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep brown-and-cream palette with a single saturated red accent on the mixer body, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Macro shot inside a polished stainless-steel mixing bowl. A spiral dough hook turns at low speed, folding shaggy pale dough into a smooth elastic mass. Light catches the curling fold. Soft warm haze of steam wisps from a kettle just out of frame. Slow rotation of the dough. 50mm full-frame, medium-close framing, warm morning window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep brown-and-cream palette with a single saturated red accent on the mixer body, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Medium shot pulling back slowly. Two adult hands cradle a polished stainless-steel mixing bowl and lift it free of the stand mixer's base. The classic stand mixer with its glossy red enamel cast-metal body remains on the butcher-block counter, still, gleaming, ready for the next bake. Light warms the red enamel. Gentle dolly out. 50mm full-frame, medium-close framing, warm morning window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep brown-and-cream palette with a single saturated red accent on the mixer body, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Warm intimate solo grand piano with soft sustained string pad underneath. Slow gentle swell over twelve seconds. Domestic-warm, A24 film score sensibility, no drum kit, no percussion, no electronic elements, no drop. Tender and unhurried. Ends on a held resolving chord.
